message:
feat(messaging): add Kafka consumer stub with Cx-integrated API surface

Add a Phase 0 Kafka consumer module that defines the full API surface
for cancel-correct message consumption integrated with the Asupersync
Cx context. All methods currently return KafkaError::NotAvailable since
rdkafka integration is deferred.

Key types and API:
- KafkaConsumer: consumer lifecycle (connect, subscribe, poll, commit, close)
- ConsumerConfig: group ID, offset reset, session/heartbeat timeouts,
  max poll records, isolation level, auto-commit toggle
- AutoOffsetReset: Earliest/Latest/None strategies
- IsolationLevel: ReadUncommitted/ReadCommitted
- ConsumerRecord: topic, partition, offset, key, value, timestamp, headers
- TopicPartition + PartitionOffsets for explicit offset management

All async methods accept &Cx and honor cancellation checkpoints.
Poll returns Vec<ConsumerRecord> for batch processing. Commit is
explicit and budget-aware. Consumer close will drain in-flight
operations when rdkafka is eventually integrated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
